message:
Add file watcher for automatic proxy reload on config changes

- Implement watcher.rs for config file monitoring
- Add notify dependency for cross-platform file watching
- Improve proxy error handling and recovery
- Update beads issue tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
